subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Beloved, Who hath ever been and unto everlasting shall be, every bearer of a name through His name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل بوده و لایزال خواهد بود هر ذی اسمی باسم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment
